summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Corporate Sponsors feature. All backend API tests passed (27/27). Admin Corporate tab allows CRUD operations for Sponsorship Levels and Corporate Sponsors. Home page displays sponsors grouped by level correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/sponsorship-levels returns all levels ordered by display_order
GET /api/corporate-sponsors returns all sponsors with level info
GET /api/corporate-sponsors/public returns sponsors grouped by level
Admin Corporate tab displays Sponsorship Levels section
Admin Corporate tab displays Corporate Sponsors section
Admin 'Add Level' button opens dialog with name, max_sponsors, display_order fields
Admin 'Add Sponsor' button opens dialog with name, level dropdown, website fields
Admin creates new sponsorship level - toast 'Level created' shown
Admin sponsor level dropdown shows all available levels
Home page displays sponsors section grouped by level (Title, Gold, Silver)
Each sponsor card shows name (and logo if uploaded)
Sponsors are clickable links to website_url when provided
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby - accessibility improvement opportunity

seed_data_verification.sponsorship_levels: 3 seeded (Title/Gold/Silver) + test levels created during testing
seed_data_verification.corporate_sponsors: 3 seeded (Acme Corporation/Tech Giant Inc/Green Energy Co) + test sponsors created

mocked_features.none: All APIs are real - no mocked functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Corporate Sponsors feature fully tested. Backend has 27 passing tests in test_corporate_sponsors.py. Key endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE for both /api/sponsorship-levels and /api/corporate-sponsors. Logo upload at POST /api/corporate-sponsors/{id}/logo accepts PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG files. Public sponsors API at GET /api/corporate-sponsors/public returns sponsors grouped by level for home page display. Max sponsors limit is enforced per level. Admin access required for all mutations.
